root.rep_text: รายงาน หุ้น-หนี้ คงเหลือ สรุปรายหน่วย
root.sql: select ta.member_group_no , ta.member_group_name , count(distinct ta.membership_no) as count_memno, sum(ta.share_stock) as share_stock, sum(ta.loan_01) as loan_01, sum(ta.loan_02) as loan_02, sum(ta.loan_03) as loan_03, sum(ta.count_01) as count_01, sum(ta.count_02) as count_02, sum(ta.count_03) as count_03, sum((case when ta.loan_01 > 0 or ta.loan_02 > 0 or ta.loan_03 > 0 then 1 else 0 end)) as have_loan from ( select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename where prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code)||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name, tm.* from ( select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no, coalesce(sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock,0) as share_stock, coalesce(sum((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code WHEN '01' THEN sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ELSE 0 END)),0) as loan_01, coalesce(sum((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code WHEN '02' THEN sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ELSE 0 END)),0) as loan_02, coalesce(sum((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code WHEN '03' THEN sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance ELSE 0 END)),0) as loan_03, coalesce(sum((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code WHEN '01' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) as count_01, coalesce(sum((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code WHEN '02' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) as count_02, coalesce(sum((CASE sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code WHEN '03' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)),0) as count_03 from sc_mem_m_membership_registered,sc_mem_m_share_mem,sc_lon_m_loan_card,sc_lon_m_rule where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type != 'รก' group by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no,sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock union all select sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock,0,0,0,0,0,0 from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_share_mem where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no and sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock > 0 and not exists(select null from sc_lon_m_loan_card where principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card .loan_type != 'รก' and membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) ) tm ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tm.membership_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no /*WHERE*/ ) ta group by ta.member_group_no ,ta.member_group_name order by ta.member_group_no ,ta.member_group_name

r_ktm_share_loan_balance_sumgroup_nest_g.sql: select tm.loan_type, tm.loan_code , sum(tm.principal_balance) as principal_balance, sum(tm.have_loan) as have_loan, count(distinct tm.membership_no ) as membership_no from ( select sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type||'/'||coalesce((select loan_code_desc from sc_lon_m_ucf_loan_code where loan_code = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_code and loan_code != '0'),'ปกติ') as loan_code , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type, (case when principal_balance > 0 then 1 else 0 end) as have_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_rule , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = {0} /*01-ฉุกเฉิน ,02-สามัญ ,03-พิเศษ*/ and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '!member_group_no_1!' and '!member_group_no_2!' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type != 'รก' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type ) tm group by tm.loan_type, tm.loan_code order by tm.loan_type, tm.loan_code
